/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/lanp2p.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/lanp2p.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lanp2p.dir/src/cli/args.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lanp2p.dir/src/cli/commands.cpp.o -o lanp2p  ../../libs/core/liblanp2p_core.a ../../libs/transfer/liblanp2p_transfer.a ../../libs/index/liblanp2p_index.a ../../libs/common/liblanp2p_common.a ../../libs/discovery/liblanp2p_discovery.a ../../libs/protocol/liblanp2p_protocol.a ../../libs/peer/liblanp2p_peer.a ../../libs/common/liblanp2p_common.a
